Assume agents take actions *approximately optimally*
\begin{align}
P(a' \mid s) \propto \exp(\alpha EU_s[a']), \qquad EU_s[a] = U(s,a) + \underset{s',~a'}{\mathbb{E}}[EU_{s'}[a']]
\end{align}

Rather than account for imperfections by scaling $\alpha$, we can encode *systematic* sources of inconsistency and sub-optimality:
